name: David Coffaro Vineyard & Winery
seoDescription: David Coffaro Vineyard & Winery: a family-run Dry Creek Valley estate in Geyserville making 100% estate-grown, produced, and bottled Zinfandel and signature

sections.heading: 100% estate wines from Dry Creek Valley
sections.subheading: Every bottle is grown, produced, and bottled on the Coffaro family's Dry Creek Valley estate in Geyserville — Zinfandel and bold red blends, poured by appointment since 1994.
badges: Family-run Dry Creek Valley estate since 1994

sections.heading: About David Coffaro
body: David and Pat Coffaro bought their Dry Creek Valley property in 1979, when the valley was still a virtually unknown grape-growing region, and made their first estate vintage in 1994. It remains a true family estate: every wine is 100% grown, produced, and bottled right on the property at 7485 Dry Creek Road in Geyserville.

The winery is best known for richly-flavored Zinfandel and bold, well-priced red blends sold direct to a loyal following through Dave's wine clubs. Tastings are a relaxed, no-pretense affair by appointment — wine poured on an expansive deck overlooking the estate vineyard, with walk-ins welcomed as staffing allows.
highlights: Family-run Dry Creek Valley estate since 1994

items.title: Estate Tastings
items.description: Taste current estate releases by appointment, Thursday–Monday; the $10 fee is waived with a purchase. Walk-ins welcome as availability permits.

items.title: Dave'S Wine Clubs
items.description: Direct-to-you shipments: the 6-bottle club at $132 a shipment or the 12-bottle club at $252 — members get first access to new releases.

items.title: Estate Zinfandel & Red Blends
items.description: Signature Dry Creek Zinfandel and proprietary red blends, all estate grown and bottled on site.

items.title: Buy Direct From The Winery
items.description: Wines are sold straight from the estate and shipped to club members and customers.

items.title: 100% Estate Grown, Produced & Bottled
items.body: Made with care and real ingredients — quality you can taste.

items.title: Family-Run Dry Creek Valley Estate Since 1994
items.body: Rooted right here in Geyserville, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: Zinfandel & Signature Red Blends
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Dave'S 6- & 12-Bottle Wine Clubs
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Tastings By Appointment, Thursday–Monday
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.quote: Probably the most unpretentious tasting room in all of Dry Creek — laid-back, welcoming, and every wine estate-grown right there on the property.
items.author: Tripadvisor reviewer

sections.heading: Hungry yet?
sections.body: Find us at 7485 Dry Creek Rd. Call (707) 433-9715 — we’re glad to help.
